title: Periodity
description: A fabric mod that adds somewhat scientifically accurate elements and alloys to Minecraft
body: ![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2271894c621b12a57b25658c5a1fea36f15de639.png) # !!! IMPORTANT MESSAGE !!! This mod has been recoded and it's vision has been decided, tools and armour are no longer planned and each new material will have mostly decoration and utility uses. # What is Periodity? Periodity is a Fabric mod that adds scientifically accurate elements, materials and alloys that have their own benefits and downsides. # Added Content These features are currently available in Periodity: - Molten variants of materials like Iron, Copper and Gold - Alloys made of different metals and compounds - Metallurgical variants of coal and carbon for making alloys # Dependencies Periodity requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
